Description: Perfboard 0.1in grid, bare pads (BusBoard PAD-1 or similar)
Notes: 3 boards per amp (1 PSU + 2 channel) x 2 amps + 2 experimentation spares. VERIFY size at cart: need >=110x75mm usable per board (PAD-1 is 100x160mm - one per board, generous).

Description: Heatsink TO-220 extrusion, <=7 C/W (Fischer or similar)
Alternate MPN: Aavid/Boyd TO-220 extrusion <=7 C/W; or bolt Q_cm to chassis floor (insulated)
Notes: Q_cm dissipates ~5 W. NEVER on any earlier BOM - found in Phase B readiness audit. VERIFY MPN/rating at cart; any TO-220 extrusion <=7 C/W works. Skip if mounting Q_cm to the chassis floor.

Description: Quick-connect 0.187in (4.8mm) female, fully insulated, 18-22 AWG (TE FASTON)
Notes: For the Qualtek IEC inlet tabs (it specifies 0.187in). VERIFY tab size + wire gauge at cart. Crimp with a proper ratchet crimper - no pliers on mains joints.

Description: Ring lug M4 stud, 18-22 AWG, insulated
Notes: Star-ground lug stack (Fig. 6) + chassis bonds + earth. Placeholder P/N - grab an assortment; quality matters more than brand.

Description: Tinned copper bus wire ~0.8 mm / 20 AWG, 25 ft spool
Notes: GND spine + 1.4 A / 2.8 A power paths on all boards (Fig. 5/6 rules).

Description: Stranded hookup wire kit: 18 AWG (power, red/black) + 22 AWG (signal) + green 18 AWG (earth)
Notes: Power pairs get twisted ~3 turns/inch. Earth runs are green only - never reuse green for anything else.

Description: Heat-shrink assortment 2:1, incl. sizes for QC terminals and mains splices
Notes: Every mains joint gets shrink - Phase B checklist item, not optional.

Description: 100 W INCANDESCENT bulb (rough-service / appliance / shop bulb) - NOT LED, NOT CFL
Notes: Dim-bulb tester element (Fig. 8). Filament bulbs still sold as rough-service/appliance bulbs. Buy 2 - they are also the fuse of the tester.

Description: Dim-bulb tester hardware: keyless lamp holder, metal handy box + cover, duplex outlet, 3-wire cord with plug
Notes: Assemble per Fig. 8: bulb in series with LINE only; N and E straight through; box earthed.

Description: Machine screw kit: M3 x 12 + nuts/washers (TO-247 mounting), M4 x 12 + star washers (star gnd, PE bond, chassis), M3 standoffs 10 mm for boards
Notes: Star washers on BOTH earth bolts are a safety requirement, not decoration.

Description: Aluminum plate ~300x250x2 mm (temporary chassis for Phase B solo test) OR the final chassis if already chosen
Notes: Phase B needs metal to bolt the IEC earth, toroid, and bridge to. Final chassis selection is a Phase D decision (ECR-7 fit checks).

Description: Cable clamps / zip ties + adhesive mounts, rubber grommets
Notes: Mains dressing rear-left per Fig. 7; strain relief on every mains run.
